creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
Created attachment 192032
Poudriere bulk build log failure

I cannot build erlang-19.3.6.7,4 in poudriere on FreeBSD 10.4 amd64. After 2 hours of building I always get 
[02:12:30] [01] [02:12:22] Finished lang/erlang | erlang-19.3.6.7,4: Failed: build/runaway
"bad_C++_code"

See attached build log
